feature_i18n_desc: Multi-language switching, supports embedded and local language files.
feature_backend_desc: Seamless communication between Go backend and Vue frontend via Wails bindings.
feature_event_desc: Real-time bidirectional communication based on Wails Events, supporting backend push to frontend.
feature_window_desc: Frameless window design with custom title bar, including minimize, maximize, and close buttons.
feature_logger_desc: Colored formatted log output, saved by startup time, with automatic old log cleanup.
feature_json_desc: Backend generates JSON data and passes it to frontend for parsing.
feature_ui_desc: Integrated Element Plus enterprise UI component library with rich interactive components.
feature_embed_desc: Frontend resources and language packs compiled into binary via Go embed for single-file distribution.
feature_dialog_desc: Invoke native OS file dialogs for file open, directory selection, and file save.
feature_fileio_desc: Read and write local file system for text content operations.
feature_overview_desc: This template integrates the following core features as a starting point for Wails projects.
author: Author
demo_data_interaction_desc: Call Go backend functions via Wails bindings, get return values.
demo_event_desc: Go backend pushes data via EventsEmit, frontend listens via EventsOn.
demo_json_desc: Backend returns JSON string, frontend parses and displays in table.
demo_lang_switch_desc: Switch application language, supports embedded and local language files.
demo_log_viewer_desc: Fetch log file list and view content.
select_log_to_view: Select a log file to view content
demo_system_info_desc: Get current OS, architecture, CPU count and other system information.
demo_file_dialog_desc: Invoke native system file dialogs for opening files, selecting directories, and saving files.
demo_notification_desc: Backend sends custom notification events to frontend via EventsEmit.
